title: The Young Genius's Harsh Expulsion From His Home
overview: A reincarnated Van trains relentlessly until his powerful magic leads his dismayed father to cast him out.

title: The Proper Way to Use Weak Magic
overview: Van arrives to find his new village under attack, so he defends his people, then plans for their future.

title: The Wonderful Renovation of an Impoverished Frontier
overview: Van strengthens village defenses as adventurers uncover signs of a nearby dungeon.

title: Rushed Hosting and a Busy Emissary Visit
overview: Van's victory is followed by visits from merchants and then an emissary from the neighboring county.

title: A Rare Species' Passionate Engagement Competition
overview: Apkallu appear on the shores of Van's lake and Van gets dragged into a competition with his marriage at stake.

title: Slaying a Dangerous Forest Dragon with Large Ballistae
overview: A forest dragon attacks the village, so Van rallies his forces who fight for the survival of the village.

title: Earnest Merchants and Receiving a Proud Title
overview: Bell & Rango refuse to let Van be swindled. Panamera visits the capital to secure a title for Van.

title: A Postapocalyptic Band's Rowdy Dungeon Exploration
overview: Ortho's party accidentally discovers the dungeon, forcing them to report it, which attracts wild adventurers.

title: The Timid Girl's Beautiful Marionette Dance
overview: Arte puts on a dance performance with her marionette magic, and the king visits to see Van's handiwork.

title: A Secret Weapon's Villainous Attack on the Homeland
overview: After defending Seatoh Village from the Kingdom of Yelenetta, Van's forces must ride to Scudett's defense.

title: The Ultimate Squad's Proud Counterattack
overview: Scuderia's forces carry out the operation to retake Scudett Fortress.

title: Easygoing Territory Defense by the Optimistic Lord
overview: Arte defends her homeland from Yelenetta Kingdom's assault.
